description: Paired 200-Agent discount-intensity sensitivity around the formal uncapped 20-percent-off coupon policy.

distance_fare_analysis.classification: short <= 5 km; medium > 5 and <= 10 km; long > 10 km
distance_fare_analysis.scope_note: Reporting bands only; they do not change destinations or mode utility.

intensity.description: Hold C3 recipients fixed and compare no coupon, 10, 20 and 30 percent discounts.

high_value_format.description: Hold C3 recipients fixed and compare uncapped 20-percent-off, flat 10-yuan and 50-minus-10 coupon formats.

scale_definition.interpretation: Mechanism sensitivity at the confirmed A1 scale, not a direct representation of a city of millions.

scope_notes: Within each seed, all discount scenarios share Agents, activities, OD, weather, C3 recipients, vehicle pool, mode-choice shocks and dispatch priorities.
Only the discount multiplier changes; destinations and planned activities remain fixed.
This is the minimum 200-Agent bridge sensitivity for the formal uncapped 20-percent-off main parameter.
The high-value-format set is the 200-Agent bridge check for the coupon-format findings first screened with 50 Agents.
